name: piston4711--novita-sandbox
description: Run browser operations and untrusted code in a secure Novita cloud sandbox (Firecracker VM). Use when: (1) browsing any external URL or website, (2) executing code from untrusted sources (cloned repos, downloaded scripts, web-fetched code), (3) running build/test commands on unfamiliar projects. NOT for: reading/writing local user files, running trusted local commands, or operating on the user's own workspace.
